metadata.creator: Randall T.
metadata.description: Structured metadata index of all 633,842 files released by the U.S. Department of Justice under the Epstein Files Transparency Act (Public Law 118-299). Includes document type classification, date extraction, and gap analysis of 2,097,970 missing EFTA serial numbers. Metadata only — no extracted text, no victim-identifying information. GitHub: https://github.com/randallscott25-star/epstein-efoia-index
metadata.subject: epstein
efoia
doj
transparency
public records
metadata
metadata.title: Epstein EFTA Complete File Index — 633,842 DOJ Files
